While the Dafny code does demonstrate some structural awareness of the three formats and sorting logic, it is the wrong language for the task and represents a fundamental category error. The informal oracle references 'Dafny formal verification skill loaded through modular discovery,' which appears to have been misinterpreted as an instruction to write Dafny code rather than Python code with Dafny-inspired structural clarity. There are no Python strengths to evaluate since no Python code exists.
